## GPT Walkthrough

### Prompt 1 — Understand
```
I'm contributing to NEURON OS personal assistant. Explain the existing code for [AREA].
What patterns must I follow?
```

### Prompt 2 — Plan
```
Design implementation for: [FEATURE]
Files to touch: [LIST]
```

### Prompt 3 — Implement
```
Implement following backend/app/api/chat.py and chat-panel.tsx patterns.
```

### Prompt 4 — Test & PR
```
Write test checklist and PR description for [FEATURE].
```
